headline: SpaceX called a bad buy alongside OpenAI and Anthropic
detail: A bearish take on SpaceX specifically questions its valuation and long-term competitive edge against AI-native companies. This is directly relevant to your two newest positions — SPCX and SPAL — both tied entirely to SpaceX sentiment. On a 2x leveraged ETF like SPAL, negative narrative momentum can accelerate losses quickly.

headline: SK Hynix stock soars, U.S. listing may pressure Micron
detail: SK Hynix strength signals continued demand in the memory and semiconductor space, which is a mild positive for chip names broadly. However, a potential U.S. listing could draw capital away from existing chip plays and create a headwind for names like AVGO and SMH. Worth watching whether this lifts or rotates money within your sector.

headline: Wall Street coalescing on a single S&P 500 target
detail: When consensus clusters tightly around one number, it often signals the market is range-bound and waiting for a catalyst rather than trending. For a margin trader concentrated in high-beta tech, a choppy sideways market is quietly painful — your losers keep losing without a bounce to bail you out. This reinforces trimming your weakest names now.
